DOWNFALLU-SNECKO.cardsModifierDescriptio: Adds Snecko cards to the reward pool.
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO.description:
A serpentine creature, native to the City.
Known for a stare that confuses predators.
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO.goldMonologue: Gold glitters strangely in your eyes.
DOWNFALLU-SNECKO.title: The Snecko
